raw_cv_text:
Arjun Mehta
+44 20 7946 0958 | Email: arjun.mehta@outlook.com | LinkedIn: arjun-mehta-distributed | GitHub: ArjunMehta |
https://arjun.dev
EDUCATION
Imperial College London | MSc Computer Science (Distributed Systems) 2019-2021
Thesis on consensus algorithms achieved 98.7% Byzantine fault tolerance; published in IEEE
Transactions on Parallel and Distributed Systems with 127 citations
Graduated with Distinction (GPA 3.95/4.0); awarded the John Pratt Prize for outstanding research in
systems engineering
ETH Zurich | BSc Computer Science 2015-2019
Ranked top 2% of cohort; led Systems Theory lab as student mentor to 8 junior students over 2 years
Completed internship on sharded database optimization reducing query latency by 62% (840ms →
320ms) for 50M+ records
EXPERIENCE
Stripe | Senior Backend Engineer (Distributed Systems) 2021-2024
Architected and deployed a new transaction settlement service handling 500K+ TPS across 4
datacenters; reduced p99 latency from 145ms to 28ms (81% improvement) and achieved 99.999%
uptime
Led design and implementation of a distributed rate-limiting system protecting payment
infrastructure; processed 2.3B requests/day with < 1ms overhead per request, preventing estimated
$12M+ in fraud losses
Managed team of 5 engineers on consensus layer refactoring; reduced database replication lag from
3.2s to 180ms (94% improvement) across 6 sharded clusters, directly enabling new real-time product
features
Cloudflare | Staff Backend Engineer 2018-2021
Designed and shipped edge cache invalidation system using gossip protocol; reduced stale content
serving by 99.2% with zero false positives across 180+ datacenters serving 250M requests/sec
Optimized distributed tracing system reducing storage costs by $2.8M annually while improving trace
collection completeness from 87% to 99.6% across 50K+ monitored services
Drove refactoring of HTTP/3 connection pooling logic; reduced memory footprint by 53% per
connection (4.2MB → 1.9MB) enabling 35% more concurrent connections per edge server
Wise (formerly TransferWise) | Backend Engineer 2016-2018
Built real-time foreign exchange distributed ledger system achieving 4ms 99th percentile latency
across 8 regions; reconciliation completeness increased from 94% to 99.97% across $140B+ in
monthly transaction volume
Implemented sharded event sourcing architecture reducing write contention by 71%; throughput
increased from 45K ops/sec to 186K ops/sec supporting 2.1M daily active users
Engineered failover orchestration system reducing MTTR from 8.5 minutes to 34 seconds; enabled
fully automated recovery for 12 critical services with zero manual intervention
PROJECTS
ConsensusDB | Rust, gRPC, Raft, Protocol Buffers 2022-2024
Open-source distributed database implementation achieving 2.1K GitHub stars; benchmarks show
94K writes/sec with sub-100ms replication latency across 5-node cluster
Built comprehensive test suite with 847 unit tests covering Byzantine fault tolerance scenarios;
achieved 99.4% code coverage and 2.3M downloads on crates.io
ShardMaster | Go, etcd, Kubernetes, Protocol Buffers 2021-2023
Distributed sharding orchestration framework reducing data rebalancing time by 68% (from 45
minutes to 14 minutes) for clusters with 1.2TB+ data; prevents shard hotspots with 94% accuracy
1.4K GitHub stars; deployed in production across 8 companies; supports automatic replication factor
adjustment maintaining 99.95% availability SLA
LatticeTrace | Rust, Apache Kafka, ClickHouse, WebAssembly 2020-2022
Observability platform for distributed systems processing 180M spans/day with < 800µs processing
latency; uses lazy evaluation to reduce storage requirements by 76% vs traditional APM
870 GitHub stars; successfully ingests traces from 340+ microservices; query response times
improved by 91% (2.3s → 210ms avg) through columnar aggregation
ReplicaSync | Scala, Apache Flink, Cassandra, gRPC 2019-2021
Real-time data replication engine supporting 5 consistency models with adaptive failover; 680
GitHub stars and used by 4 production teams handling 890K events/sec
Achieved 99.98% replication accuracy with < 450ms max propagation delay across multi-region
clusters; reduced operational incidents by 87% vs legacy replication approach
EXTRACURRICULAR
DistributedSystems.fyi | Founder & Content Lead 2021-Present
Built educational platform with 240+ technical articles on consensus, sharding, and fault tolerance;
accumulated 47K monthly readers and 8.2K newsletter subscribers
Mentored 34 engineers through intensive system design program; 92% of mentees secured senior+
positions at tier-1 companies within 6 months
VLDB & ACM SIGMOD | Technical Speaker & Conference Committee 2020-Present
Delivered talks on 'Consensus at Scale' (VLDB 2023) and 'Distributed Tracing Trade-offs' (SIGMOD
2022); combined audience reach of 2,400+ researchers; talks received average 4.7/5 feedback rating
Reviewed 28 papers as committee member for distributed systems track; co-organized workshop on
'Byzantine Fault Tolerance in Production' attended by 180+ practitioners
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Rust, Go, Scala, Python, Java, C++
Technologies – Raft, Paxos, gRPC, Apache Kafka, Cassandra, PostgreSQL, etcd, ZooKeeper,
Elasticsearch, Prometheus, Jaeger, Kubernetes, Docker
Tools – Git, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, GitLab CI/CD, DataDog, New Relic, Grafana, Protocol
Buffers, Apache Flink, Redis
